info.name: DOE — Lead Engine Test Harness
info.description:
Simulate inbound leads from any external source (web_form / email / whatsapp / meta_lead_ads / portal) and inspect the Lead Engine intake ledger.

## Setup
1. Import this collection.
2. Set the collection variables (or use an Environment):
   - `baseUrl` — e.g. `http://localhost:3000` (dev) or your deployed origin.
   - `simulationToken` — value of `LEAD_SIMULATION_TOKEN`. In local dev with the env var unset you can leave it blank; the surface is open outside production.
3. Run the requests. `Simulate Lead — *` requests auto-save the returned `id` into `lastLeadId` for the inspect requests.

## Notes
- Each request sends `Authorization: Bearer {{simulationToken}}`. If the token is blank the header is still sent but ignored in non-production.
- Phone leads require `PHONE_HASH_SALT` to be configured on the server, otherwise the API returns 422. Leads without a phone work without it.
- Re-sending the same `idempotencyKey` returns the SAME lead id with `deduped: true`.

request.description: List the valid `source` values and which currently have an ingestion adapter wired.
Simulate a WhatsApp lead. NOTE: phone leads require PHONE_HASH_SALT on the server, else this returns 422.

item.name: Simulate Lead — Meta Lead Ads (no phone)

request.description: Simulate a Meta Lead Ads lead with no phone — works without PHONE_HASH_SALT.

body.raw:
{
  "source": "meta_lead_ads",
  "name": "Dedupe Demo",
  "email": "dedupe-demo@example.com",
  "content": "Send this twice — the second call returns the same id with deduped: true.",
  "idempotencyKey": "demo-fixed-key-001"
}

request.description: Send this request TWICE. The first call creates the lead (201, deduped: false); the second returns the same id (200, deduped: true).
List recently recorded inbound leads with their intake status. Optional `status` filter: received | parsed | queued | failed.
Fetch a single inbound lead's detail (uses `lastLeadId` saved by the simulate requests). Includes the verbatim rawPayload; never returns the raw phone.
